description: Returns tenant membership, role, entitlement state, and subscription status for the calling user.

role.notes: null if user has no membership row

subscription_status.notes: expiring = active AND <=5 days remain. Computed server-side. WeWeb checks string only.

subscription_days_remaining.notes: null when subscription_status is none. 0 or negative when expired.

notes: role is null when is_member is false. entitled mirrors is_member. subscription_status and subscription_days_remaining added in Build Route 10.8.2. Expiring threshold (5 days) lives in RPC -- WeWeb performs zero date math per GUARDRAILS §5.
